reviews.review_title: Top five best gorilla tag copies
reviews.review_description: I love this game. I read it a 10 out of 10 this game is really fun but I think they should add third person and they should add a button for one V1 and 2V2 but out of this game is the best game ever but there’s some other games that are better But this is one of the top 5+ it has many mods, but this game is in the top five

The game is good but it’s not the best:

- It has a lot of mods you can think of

- You can use some in infection codes but most of the other ones are bannable in infection codes (u can use them in Modded/Casual

————————————-CONS——————————————-

- People use the mods to their advantage in public infection lobbies

- You can sometimes get banned for nothing

They use the power of the moderators and they banned me for standing up for my friend and he got banned for only saying 1 bad word because he was frustrated and it got all serious. The moderator was impersonating as TTTPIG
Tuff

I was banned for using mods even tho the mod boards are in stump and when I in game the admins/ moderators were really rude Dont get this game it would be good if you could use the mods without being harassed but just get gtag instead of this
